news.title: Nvidia's Quarterly Profit Hits $43 Billion on Strong A.I. Chip Sales
news.snippet: Nvidia's profit for the last 12 months hit $120 billion, providing ample evidence that it is cashing in on the tech industry's artificial intelligence boom more than any other company in the world.
